article.title: EU forced to exempt banned Chinese chipmaker after auto industry warns of supply crisis — European car factories warn of imminent supply chain collapse
article.summary: The European Commission is preparing to propose a temporary exemption for a Chinese semiconductor manufacturer from the EU's 20th Russia sanctions package.
article.title_zh: 歐盟被迫豁免遭禁中國晶片製造商 產業警告供應鏈危機——歐洲車廠警告面臨迫在眉睫的供應鏈崩潰
article.summary_zh: 歐盟委員會準備提議對一家中國半導體製造商提供臨時豁免，將其從第 20 份俄羅斯制裁方案中豁除。

article.title: AI Debt Boom Sparks Warnings
article.summary: Danielle Poli, Managing Director and Co-Portfolio Manager of Global Credit at Oaktree Capital Management joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the hidden risks behind the AI boom, why higher interest rates may be here longer than markets expect, and where investors are still finding 8–10% yields. She warns that massive AI debt issuance could create future cracks in credit markets, especially in private credit and leveraged loans. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: AI 債務繁榮引發警告
article.summary_zh: Oaktree Capital Management 董事總經理兼全球信用共同投資組合經理 Danielle Poli 在 Bloomberg Open Interest 上分析了 AI 繁榮背後的隱藏風險、為何利率可能會更長期高於預期，以及投資者在哪裡仍能找到 8–10% 的收益。

article.title: EU Seeks to Lift Ban on Chinese Chips It Barred Only Weeks Ago
article.summary: The European Union will propose temporarily lifting sanctions on a major Chinese semiconductor supplier after automakers warned of impending supply chain chaos if the ban isn’t removed.
article.title_zh: 歐盟尋求解除對其數週前禁止的中國晶片的禁令
article.summary_zh: 歐盟將提議臨時解除對主要中國半導體供應商的制裁，此前汽車製造商警告如果不解除禁令將面臨供應鏈混亂。

article.title: Anthropic’s New Consulting Venture Makes Its First Acquisition
article.summary: The new artificial intelligence enterprise services firm backed by Blackstone Inc., Anthropic PBC and Hellman & Friedman has picked a San Francisco firm called Fractional AI as the operational centerpiece of the as-yet unnamed venture.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 新諮詢事業公司完成首次收購
article.summary_zh: 由 Blackstone Inc.、Anthropic PBC 和 Hellman & Friedman 支持的新 AI 企業服務公司選擇舊金山公司 Fractional AI 作為該尚未命名事業的運營中心。

article.title: Google gets ‘intelligent’ Search box redesign, information agents, mini apps, & more
article.summary: Google Search received big updates at I/O 2026. For starters, AI Mode is now powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash globally and has over 1 billion users every month. more…
article.title_zh: Google 推出「智能」搜尋框重新設計、信息代理、迷你應用等功能
article.summary_zh: Google Search 在 I/O 2026 進行了大幅更新，AI Mode 現由 Gemini 3.5 Flash 全球驅動，擁有超 10 億月度用戶。

article.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
article.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.
article.title_zh: 如何使用 Google 的新 AI agents 進行超越標準搜尋的操作
article.summary_zh: Google 正推出 AI 驅動的「資訊 agents」，可在背景監控主題並主動提醒用戶更新和變化。

article.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
article.summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The company is also merging its AI Overviews and AI Mode features into a single, seamless search flow, eliminating the friction that previously forced users to choose between a traditional results page and
article.title_zh: Google 剛剛在 25 年來首次重新設計搜尋框——以下是為什麼這比你想像的更重要
article.summary_zh: 四分之一世紀以來，Google 搜尋框一直是計算中最易識別的介面之一：一個薄白色矩形、閃爍的遊標、幾個輸入的字和一個藍色連結列表。週二，Google 將正式淘汰這一範式。

article.title: Gemini app rolling out ‘Neural Expressive’ redesign, 3.5 Flash, 24/7 Spark agent, & Daily Brief
article.summary: At I/O 2026, Google announced major updates to Gemini across the underlying model and new app features. The Gemini app now has over 900 million monthly active users. more…
article.title_zh: Gemini 應用推出「Neural Expressive」重新設計、3.5 Flash、全天候 Spark 代理和每日簡報
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 宣布 Gemini 的重大更新，Gemini 應用現擁有超 9 億月度活躍用戶。

article.title: Google turns Gemini into a proactive AI agent with Spark, Daily Brief, and a major redesign
article.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google is rolling out a redesigned Gemini app with its new “Neural Expressive” design language, richer responses, improved Gemini Live conversations, and support across Android, iOS, and the web. The company also announced new AI agents called Daily Brief and Gemini Spark, with Spark designed to proactively handle tasks across Gmail, Docs, and other connected apps. Gemini Omni is also coming to the Gemini app as a new multimodal model that can generate and edit cinematic videos from text, images, and clips. Google just announced one of the biggest overhauls to the Gemini app yet at Google I/O 2026, introducing a redesigned interface, proactive AI agents, and a powerful new video generation model called Gemini Omni.
article.title_zh: Google 通過 Spark、Daily Brief 和重大重新設計將 Gemini 轉變為主動式 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: Google 推出重新設計的 Gemini 應用，採用「Neural Expressive」設計語言，並推出 Daily Brief 和 Spark 等新 AI 代理。

article.title: Open-source non-profit claims Bambu Lab violated license — SFC steps in after multi-billion dollar 3D printer giant threatened independent developer, issued cease-and-desist demand on OrcaSlicer fork that restored cloud printing features
article.summary: The SFC says that including proprietary code alongside software under AGPLv3 breaks the open-source license, and that Bambu Lab has been doing this for years.
article.title_zh: 開源非營利組織聲稱 Bambu Lab 違反許可協議 — SFC 介入，數十億美元 3D 印表機巨頭威脅獨立開發者，對恢復雲列印功能的 OrcaSlicer 分支發送停止函
article.summary_zh: SFC 指出 Bambu Lab 將專有代碼與 AGPLv3 授權軟體一起發布違反開源許可，該公司多年來一直在這樣做。

article.title: Android Auto is getting massive music app redesigns, starting with these apps [Gallery]
article.summary: Alongside various other announcements at Google I/O 2026, we’re getting a deeper preview of major media app changes on Android Auto, as well as a list of apps that will be adopting the changes first. more…
article.title_zh: Android Auto 推出大規模音樂應用重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 預覽了 Android Auto 上主要媒體應用的重大更新，並列出首批採納新設計的應用。

article.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash is here: Google’s smartest speed model promises better coding and agents
article.summary: TL;DR At Google I/O 2026, Google has introduced the Gemini 3.5 family of AI models, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash. Gemini 3.5 Flash is said to be four times faster than competing frontier models and outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro on coding and agentic benchmarks. Gemini 3.5 Flash is rolling out globally as the default model for billions of users in the Gemini app and Google Search. Gemini is one of the best AI models around, with each release being widely applauded for pushing the envelope of what end users can achieve with AI. Google released Gemini 3 in November 2025, followed by Gemini 3.1 in February 2026. Today at Google I/O 2026, Google is releasing Gemini 3.5 to the world, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash, which is already rolling out to billions of users globally.
article.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 發佈：Google 最快速的智能模型承諾更好的代碼編寫和代理功能
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash，速度快 4 倍，在編碼和代理基準測試中超越 Gemini 3.1 Pro。

article.title: Samsung reportedly set to distribute up to $26.6 billion to staff in AI-driven semiconductor bonuses after last-minute union deal — average payouts could approach $400,000 per chip employee
article.summary: Samsung Electronics is reportedly preparing to distribute up to 40 trillion won ($26.6 billion) in semiconductor employee bonuses after reaching a last-minute labor agreement. The proposed deal ties payouts to AI-driven chip profits and could see average employee bonuses approach $400,000.
article.title_zh: Samsung 據報將向員工發放高達 266 億美元 AI 驅動晶片獎金 在工會協議達成後——平均單位獎金可高達 40 萬美元
article.summary_zh: Samsung Electronics 據報將在達成勞資協議後，向員工發放高達 40 兆韓元（266 億美元）的半導體獎金，平均員工獎金可達 40 萬美元。

article.title: Building the agentic agreement enterprise: How developers are unlocking agentic experiences with Docusign’s MCP server and platform
article.summary: Managing agreements across the enterprise has traditionally been a slow, manual process. Docusign for Developers has accelerated the process through automation of tedious steps, but the infusion of agentic AI promises to further speed agreement management, transforming it into an agile, seamless, and high-velocity workflow. At Momentum 2026 , Docusign’s annual customer conference, Docusign is pushing this boundary with key releases for developers: the Docusign MCP Server, the Agreement Manager API, IAM Toolkit, and a revamped Developer Console. The MCP server: Making agreements agent-ready A primary challenge for AI agents within the enterprise is the generalist nature of LLM platforms. While remarkably capable, they frequently lack the specialized, domain-specific institutional memo
article.title_zh: 構建代理協議企業：開發人員如何通過 Docusign 的 MCP 伺服器解鎖代理體驗
article.summary_zh: 企業協議管理傳統上是緩慢的手動流程，Docusign for Developers 通過自動化加速了該過程，而代理 AI 的融合承諾進一步加快協議管理，將其轉變為敏捷無縫的體驗。
